subject: Nikhil Reddy
fact: Nikhil Reddy was eager to continue the storyline.
source_quote: Nikhil Reddy: Confirmed he had been eager to continue the storyline

subject: Toblen
fact: Toblen did not want trouble in his common room.
source_quote: Toblen deflected, saying he did not want trouble in his common room

subject: Toblen
fact: Toblen believed trouble in Phandalin had a habit of following people home.
source_quote: trouble in Phandalin had a habit of following people home

subject: Toblen
fact: Toblen was fearful of the Red Brands.
source_quote: Toblen is aware of the Red Brands' threat but is too fearful to speak openly

subject: Freda
fact: Freda appeared nervous.
source_quote: Freda appeared nervous and quietly angry

subject: Freda
fact: Freda appeared quietly angry.
source_quote: Freda appeared nervous and quietly angry

subject: Freda
fact: Freda knew who was behind Gundren's disappearance.
source_quote: She stated she knew who was behind Gundren's disappearance

subject: Freda
fact: Freda wanted the Red Brands gone.
source_quote: Freda expressed that she wanted the Red Brands gone

subject: Freda
fact: Freda did not want her neighbors hurt.
source_quote: but did not want her neighbors hurt

subject: Freda
fact: Freda suspected the townspeople feared or owed Halia.
source_quote: raising suspicion about whether they fear her, owe her, or both

subject: Tuck
fact: Tuck was concerned about people who get taken not always coming back.
source_quote: Tuck expressed concern about people who get taken not always coming back

subject: Narth
fact: Narth believed Sister Garaele refused to explain what happened likely to protect the townspeople.
source_quote: refused to explain what had happened, likely to protect the townspeople

subject: Narth
fact: Narth believed Sister Garaele might be willing to speak with temple folk.
source_quote: Narth suggested that Sister Garaele might be willing to speak with temple folk like Sister Maela

subject: Nikhil Reddy
fact: Nikhil Reddy agreed to try to speak with Sister Garaele.
source_quote: Nikhil Reddy: Agreed to try to speak with Sister Garaele

subject: Lenar
fact: Lenar believed Harbin Wester was useless.
source_quote: Lenar identified Harbin Wester as the useless town master

subject: Lenar
fact: Lenar believed Harbin Wester hides behind notices and wax seals.
source_quote: who hides behind notices and wax seals

subject: Daran Edermath
fact: Daran expressed enthusiasm upon meeting the party.
source_quote: Daran expressed enthusiasm upon meeting the party

subject: Daran Edermath
fact: Daran praised Pip's dedication to doing good.
source_quote: praised Pip's dedication to doing good

subject: Daran Edermath
fact: Daran expressed concern about the Red Brands.
source_quote: Daran confirmed concern about the Red Brands

subject: Daran Edermath
fact: Daran believes someone needs to confront the leader of the Red Brands, Glasstaff.
source_quote: stated that someone needs to confront their leader, Glasstaff

subject: Daran Edermath
fact: Daran expressed concern about dangerous magic at Old Owl Well.
source_quote: expressed concern about dangerous magic there

subject: Daran Edermath
fact: Daran urged the party to prioritize rescuing Gundren before pursuing side quests.
source_quote: Daran urged the party to prioritize rescuing Gundren before pursuing side quests

subject: Shrine Acolyte
fact: The acolyte recognized the party as those searching for Gundren.
source_quote: recognized the party as those searching for Gundren

subject: Shrine Acolyte
fact: The acolyte would not assign the new quest until Gundren's situation was resolved.
source_quote: would not assign it until Gundren's situation was resolved

subject: Kostadis
fact: Kostadis believes delaying the rescue of Gundren carries real risk because his captors are extracting information.
source_quote: Delaying the rescue of Gundren carries real risk — his captors are extracting information from him

subject: Kostadis
fact: Kostadis fears the captors may decide to kill Gundren once they have what they need.
source_quote: may decide to kill him once they have what they need

subject: Nikhil Reddy
fact: Nikhil Reddy decided to prioritize rescuing Gundren over pursuing side quests.
source_quote: Decided to prioritize rescuing Gundren over pursuing side quests

subject: Kostadis
fact: Kostadis believes the party moved cautiously rather than rushing.
source_quote: The party moved cautiously rather than rushing

subject: Nikhil Reddy
fact: Nikhil Reddy proposed a silent surprise attack after Zenvon's scouting.
source_quote: proposed a silent surprise attack

subject: Kostadis
fact: Kostadis observed that the goblin guards were bored and inattentive.
source_quote: The guards were bored and inattentive

subject: Kostadis
fact: Kostadis noted that the goblin boss had an armor class of 17.
source_quote: The goblin boss had an armor class of 17

subject: Kostadis
fact: Kostadis prefers to focus on gameplay over resource accounting regarding encumbrance.
source_quote: preferring to focus on gameplay over resource accounting

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon passed the chained wolves in the cave undetected.
source_quote: passed them undetected

subject: Kostadis
fact: Kostadis noted that Veyra's blue candle provides light but would compromise stealth.
source_quote: Veyra's blue candle provides light but would compromise stealth

subject: Kostadis
fact: Kostadis observed that the giant snake had not yet noticed Zenvon.
source_quote: the snake had not yet noticed him

subject: Nikhil Reddy
fact: Nikhil Reddy decided to slowly tiptoe back to the party.
source_quote: Decided to slowly tiptoe back to the party
